label: p9_d16_q8t16_f32_ssm_out_decode
hardware: local RX 7900 XTX / gfx1100 24 GiB card; W7900 rerun unverified
change: Add a Q8_0 T16 F32-input/BF16-output single GEMV registry variant and route qwen35moe rows=1 linear-attention ssm_out directly from the FP32 GDN output when resident decode repack is enabled, eliminating the per-layer f32_to_bf16 conversion launch before ssm_out.

correctness.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_p9_e2e_correctness.py --fixture tests/fixtures/gguf/qwen36_35b_a3b_q4km_p9_e2e.json --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d16_q8f32_ssmout_e2e.json

benchmark.command: HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 128 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 1 --measured-runs 3 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d16_q8f32_ssmout_512x128_bench.json

rocprof_decode_512x16_diagnostic.command: rm -rf /tmp/p9_d16_q8f32_ssmout_512x16_rocprof_csv && HIPENGINE_GGUF_DECODE_REPACK=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_GEMV_DECODE=1 HIPENGINE_GGUF_WMMA_PREFILL=1 HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt PYTHONPATH=. rocprofv3 --kernel-trace -d /tmp/p9_d16_q8f32_ssmout_512x16_rocprof_csv -f csv -- python3 scripts/qwen35_gguf_bench.py --model /models/gguf/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-UD-Q4_K_M.gguf --quant gguf_q4_k_m --prompt-length 512 --decode-tokens 16 --warmup-decode-tokens 1 --warmup-runs 0 --measured-runs 1 --force-bulk-prefill --bulk-prefill-attention-mode bulk --graph-replay-decode --graph-steps-per-replay 1 --compiler-version-file /tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version.txt --require-cached-build --json /tmp/p9_d16_q8f32_ssmout_512x16_bench.json
rocprof_decode_512x16_diagnostic.candidate_kernel: void (anonymous namespace)::q8_0_t16_gemv_kernel<float, unsigned short>(float const*, unsigned char const*, unsigned short*, long, long, long) for ssm_out

baseline.label: P9.D15 dense BF16 alpha/beta dual decode

decision: Retain as a correctness-neutral launch removal for qwen35moe linear-attention decode. #51/#52/#26 remain blocked below the 95 tok/s decode target.
